actual_title: Algorithmic Literacy for the Modern World

cards.title: Algorithmic Literacy
cards.governance_note: Recognize, interpret, question, and responsibly use algorithmic systems.

cards.title: Procedural Transparency
cards.governance_note: Make steps, rules, objectives, assumptions, and workflow boundaries visible.

cards.title: Contestability
cards.governance_note: Provide correction, appeal, review, and escalation paths where consequences matter.

cards.title: Human Judgment
cards.governance_note: Keep human interpretation and accountability active where uncertainty, values, or stakes require it.
